phrases.text_local: Onde fica a paragem central do Aerobus?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH puh-RAH-zhayng sayngt-RAHL DOO uhih-roo-BOOSH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Paragem Central do Aerobus.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng sayngt-RAHL DOO uhih-roo-BOOSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Aerobus Central Stop.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Aerobus Central Stop.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng sayngt-RAHL DOO uhih-roo-BOOSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Paragem Central do Aerobus.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a estação de metro da Linha Vermelha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH shtuh-SOWN DIH MEHT-roo DUH LEE-nyuh veh-ruh-MEH-lyuh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Linha Vermelha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LEE-nyuh veh-ruh-MEH-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Red Line.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Red Line.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LEE-nyuh veh-ruh-MEH-lyuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Linha Vermelha.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala da TAP no aeroporto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DUH TAHP NOO uhih-roo-POH-ruh-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff prioritize concise directions to maintain airport flow.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Terminal 1, saguão partidas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH tih-ruh-mee-NAHL OOM, suhg-WOWN puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in Terminal 1, departures hall.

responses.english: Good morning, in Terminal 1, departures hall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH tih-ruh-mee-NAHL OOM, suhg-WOWN puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Terminal 1, saguão partidas.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Aerobus central stop?
phrases.text_local: Onde é a paragem central do Aerobus?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH puh-RAH-zhayng sayngt-RAHL DOO uhih-roo-BOOSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Aerobus provides direct connectivity between the airport and city center.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a paragem central do Aerobus.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng sayngt-RAHL DOO uhih-roo-BOOSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Aerobus central stop.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Aerobus central stop.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng sayngt-RAHL DOO uhih-roo-BOOSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a paragem central do Aerobus.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Terminal 2 charter hall?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o hall de charter da Terminal 2?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AHL DIH shuh-ruh-TEHR DUH tih-ruh-mee-NAHL DOYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Charter operations are separated from scheduled commercial flights for logistics.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o hall de charter após o controlo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL DIH shuh-ruh-TEHR uh-PAWSH AW koongt-RAW-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the charter hall after security.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the charter hall after security.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AHL DIH shuh-ruh-TEHR uh-PAWSH AW koongt-RAW-loo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o hall de charter após o controlo.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy a SIM card?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar um cartão SIM no aeroporto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR OONNG kuh-ruh-TOWN SEEN NOO uhih-roo-POH-ruh-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Both physical SIM and eSIM options are readily available for international travelers.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os quiosques de SIM.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH SEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the SIM card kiosks.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the SIM card kiosks.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH SEEN.
responses.french: Siga as placas para os quiosques de SIM.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the TAP lounge entrance?
phrases.text_local: Onde está a entrada da sala VIP da TAP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH SAH-luh VEEP DUH TAHP?
phrases.cultural_note: Lounge access requires valid boarding passes or eligible loyalty status.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a sala VIP da TAP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh VEEP DUH TAHP.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the TAP lounge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the TAP lounge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh VEEP DUH TAHP.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a sala VIP da TAP.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Viva Viagem machine?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a máquina do cartão Viva Viagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH MAH-kee-nuh DOO kuh-ruh-TOWN VEE-vuh VEEAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: The Viva Viagem card is essential for accessing Lisbon public transport.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Metro Linha Vermelha. Lá encontrará a máquina do Viva Viagem.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW MEHT-roo LEE-nyuh veh-ruh-MEH-lyuh. LAH ayng-koongt-ruh-RAH AH MAH-kee-nuh DOO VEE-vuh VEEAH-zhayng.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Red Line Metro. There you will find the Viva Viagem machine.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Red Line Metro. There you will find the Viva Viagem machine.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW MEHT-roo LEE-nyuh veh-ruh-MEH-lyuh. LAH ayng-koongt-ruh-RAH AH MAH-kee-nuh DOO VEE-vuh VEEAH-zhayng.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Metro Linha Vermelha. Lá encontrará a máquina do Viva Viagem.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the SIM card kiosks?
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro os quiosques de cartão SIM?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN SEEN?
phrases.cultural_note: Communication kiosks are strategically placed near high-traffic departure zones.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os quiosques de cartão SIM.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN SEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the SIM card kiosks.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the SIM card kiosks.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN SEEN.
responses.french: Siga as placas para os quiosques de cartão SIM.

phrases.text_local: Como chego à Terminal 2 para voos charter?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH tih-ruh-mee-NAHL DOYSH PUH-ruh VOOSH shuh-ruh-TEHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Airports rely on standardized signage to guide passengers efficiently.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas Terminal 2.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh tih-ruh-mee-NAHL DOYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs Terminal 2.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs Terminal 2.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh tih-ruh-mee-NAHL DOYSH.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas Terminal 2.
